hyperedges.label: Voice Pipeline: Wakeword â†’ Listen â†’ Transcribe â†’ Process â†’ Speak
Security Defense-in-Depth: Path, Shell, URL, Audit
LLM Provider Cascade: Kimi K2 â†’ OpenRouter â†’ Ollama
Windows Security and Privacy Boundary Features
Layered Security Defense (Path Sandbox + Shell Allowlist + Process Protection + Audit + Confirmation)
RAG Pipeline: Ingest and Query Components
KORTEX 5-Layer Prompt: System + Memory + RAG + History + User
Three Personality Modes: Loki / Jarvis / Friday
